papers.title_en: Multiscale Switch for Semi-Supervised and Contrastive Learning in Medical Ultrasound Image Segmentation
papers.tldr: 本研究针对医学超声图像标注数据稀缺及成像伪影（如斑点噪声、低对比度）带来的分割难题，提出了一种结合半监督学习与对比学习的多尺度切换（Multiscale Switch）框架。该方法通过在不同尺度间动态切换和融合特征，增强了模型对复杂边界的捕捉能力。实验表明，该方法在减少对标注数据依赖的同时，显著提升了超声图像分割的鲁棒性与准确性，为临床超声自动分析提供了有效方案。
papers.abstract_en: Medical ultrasound (US) image segmentation faces significant challenges due tolimited labeled data and characteristic imaging artifacts, including speckle noise andlow-contrast boundaries. While semi-supervised learning (SSL) approaches have …

papers.title_en: Decoupling Target Semantics via Text-anchored Visual Contrast for Semi-supervised Medical Image Segmentation
papers.tldr: 本研究针对半监督医学图像分割中因标注不足导致的语义模糊问题，提出了一种基于文本锚点视觉对比的学习框架。该方法通过引入文本语义作为锚点，引导模型在对比学习中更准确地解耦和区分不同的解剖结构。实验证明，该方法在极少标注的情况下仍能显著提升分割精度，为缓解医学影像中的语义歧义提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Semi-supervised learning (SSL) provides an effective means of reducing reliance onlarge-scale annotated datasets by leveraging unlabeled data. However, existing SSLmethods often struggle with semantic ambiguity, especially under limited …
